Appearances: Tony Tam for Veronica Jung (Trustee).

Mr. Tam provided endorsed copies of the petition and the notice of hearing, and a copy of a proposed order. The Petition for Order Approving Modification of Trust Terms is continued to August 21, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
